---
name: Security remediation
about: Track a validated backend security issue or hardening task
title: "[security] "
labels: security,backend
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the issue without including secrets, exploit payloads with live credentials, or private user data.

## Affected Area

Endpoint, service, data model, deployment surface, or GitHub/ops setting.

## Risk

Describe the likely impact and who can trigger it.

## Required Fix

What behavior must change?

## Regression Tests

Which tests should prevent this from returning?

## Notes

Use private channels for sensitive evidence, tokens, credentials, production dumps, or user data.
